mapper.sql: t.id, t.type, COALESCE(NULLIF(t.item_name, ''), c.name, '') AS item_name, t.amount, t.occurred_at, t.channel, t.online_app, t.offline_place, t.payment_method_id, COALESCE(pm.name, t.payment_method_name, '') AS payment_method_name, t.category_id, COALESCE(c.name, '已删除分类') AS category_name, t.note
FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = t.category_id AND c.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN payment_methods pm ON pm.id = t.payment_method_id AND pm.user_id = t.user_id AND pm.deleted = 0
